texto: I sought my liberty and the liberty of all, my happiness and the happiness of all. I wanted a roof for every family, bread for every mouth, education for every heart, light for every intellect. I am convinced that human history has not yet begun, that we find ourselves in the last period of the prehistoric. I see with the eyes of my soul how the sky is diffused with the rays of the new millennium.
explicacao: Citação de Vanzetti sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I sought my liberty and the liberty of all, my happiness and the happiness of all. I wanted a roo…” articula educacao, freedom, happiness em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e happiness.
